W_TEMP_HIGH.description: Motor or component temperature exceeded warning threshold
W_TEMP_HIGH.typical_cause: Bearing wear, insufficient cooling, overloaded motor, blocked ventilation
W_TEMP_HIGH.recommended_check: Inspect cooling fan, check bearing lubrication, verify airflow

W_MOTOR_STRESS.description: Motor operating under elevated stress — current above nominal
W_MOTOR_STRESS.typical_cause: Increased mechanical load from friction, bearing wear, or drive misalignment
W_MOTOR_STRESS.recommended_check: Check belt tension, inspect motor bearings, verify drive alignment

E_JOINT_TEMP_CRITICAL.description: Robotic arm joint temperature exceeded critical threshold
E_JOINT_TEMP_CRITICAL.typical_cause: Joint bearing failure, loss of lubrication, servo motor overheating
E_JOINT_TEMP_CRITICAL.recommended_check: Inspect joint bearing, check lubrication levels, verify servo cooling

W_VIBRATION_HIGH.description: Vibration level above warning threshold on robotic arm
W_VIBRATION_HIGH.typical_cause: Joint bearing wear, loose fasteners, servo resonance, load imbalance
W_VIBRATION_HIGH.recommended_check: Inspect joints and fasteners, check bearing play, review servo tuning

E_SERVO_OVERCURRENT.description: Servo motor current approaching or exceeding critical limit
E_SERVO_OVERCURRENT.typical_cause: Mechanical obstruction, bearing seizure, electrical fault in servo drive
E_SERVO_OVERCURRENT.recommended_check: Inspect for mechanical obstruction, check servo drive, test motor windings

W_CYCLE_DEGRADED.description: Machine cycle time significantly above nominal
W_CYCLE_DEGRADED.typical_cause: Joint stiffness from wear, software throttle due to thermal condition, mechanical friction
W_CYCLE_DEGRADED.recommended_check: Review motion program, check joint health, verify no obstruction in work area

E_PRESSURE_LOW.description: Hydraulic outlet pressure critically below operating minimum
E_PRESSURE_LOW.typical_cause: Seal failure, pump wear, internal bypass, blockage on inlet
E_PRESSURE_LOW.recommended_check: Inspect all seals, check pump impeller, verify inlet valve open

W_FLOW_REDUCED.description: Hydraulic flow rate below nominal operating level
W_FLOW_REDUCED.typical_cause: Partial seal failure, pump cavitation, partially closed valve, filter blockage
W_FLOW_REDUCED.recommended_check: Check inline filters, inspect valves, test pump output at no-load

W_SEAL_INTEGRITY.description: Hydraulic seal pressure differential outside acceptable specification
W_SEAL_INTEGRITY.typical_cause: Seal aging, contaminated fluid, incorrect installation, thermal cycling damage
W_SEAL_INTEGRITY.recommended_check: Replace seal pack, flush hydraulic fluid, inspect seal surfaces

W_VIBRATION_ELEVATED.description: Overall vibration above warning threshold for extended period
W_VIBRATION_ELEVATED.typical_cause: Rotor imbalance, loose mounting, worn bearings, resonance at operating speed
W_VIBRATION_ELEVATED.recommended_check: Perform dynamic balancing, tighten mounting bolts, inspect bearings

W_MOTOR_CURRENT_HIGH.description: Motor current draw above nominal rated amperage
W_MOTOR_CURRENT_HIGH.typical_cause: Increased mechanical load from imbalance, bearing friction, or drive inefficiency
W_MOTOR_CURRENT_HIGH.recommended_check: Verify load conditions, inspect bearings, check motor efficiency

W_IMBALANCE_DETECTED.description: Asymmetric vibration signature detected — indicative of rotor mass imbalance
W_IMBALANCE_DETECTED.typical_cause: Material buildup on rotor, damaged impeller blade, partial coupling failure
W_IMBALANCE_DETECTED.recommended_check: Clean rotor surfaces, inspect impeller blades, perform dynamic balance test
